variants: Sofia Neofytou, an expert in conservation biology, currently lives in Midbrook Springs. She is recognized for her groundbreaking invention, the Kindle Core Analyzer, which has significantly improved research methodologies in her field. Her contributions to conservation have been honored with the Horizon Beacon Token. In her personal life, Sofia enjoys being an active member of the Peregrine Leatherworkers, where she collaborates with other crafting enthusiasts to refine their skills.
